Ollama shifts to llama.cpp for GGUF compatibility.

Ollama v0.30.0 adds MLX acceleration on Apple Silicon with GGUF support.

Direct llama.cpp integration replaces GGML, enabling GGUF file format compatibility and faster Mac inference via MLX.
